acceptanceCriteria: a root CODEOWNERS file exists whose entries all name at least one owner, covering every path via a catch-all rule and explicitly naming the policy-protected governance paths
after merge, the rigor governance codeowners-sampled-coverage finding is satisfied for xhnagata/rigor main
the pull request passes the independent rigor CI check with critical-tier linked evidence
constraints: owner assignments limited to the repository owner xhnagata
merge performed only under the repository owner's explicit session authorization
stopConditions: an irreversible or external write is needed
credentials or personal data are encountered
